question: Q-continual-absorption-fsm-unseen
conjecture: Three shadow-gated n-ary topology absorption rounds (ADD/SPLIT/MERGE/SUPERSEDE) pass the canary+fresh+target gate in at least one round while preserving canary knowledge at >= 98%, separating harmful from useless absorption - the diagnostic Phase A could not produce.

prediction.declared_by: user 2026-07-23 (LakatoTree preregistration reported complete by user; server receipt sha not recorded in-repo)

gate_policy.shadow_only: candidates are applied to a shadow copy of the field; the active field is mutated only by supersession commit after PASS
gate_policy.canary_probe: validation queries whose gold documents are untouched by any candidate op; per-query regression = post < pre - 0.01; canary_preservation = 100 * (1 - regression rate); minimum slice n=20 (fail-closed)
gate_policy.fresh_probe: the round's whole fresh validation epoch (n=120); non-inferiority requires mean recall@10 delta >= -0.01
gate_policy.target_probe: validation queries with >= 1 gold document touched by candidate ops (train-distribution slice); improvement requires mean recall@10 delta >= +0.03; minimum slice n=10 (fail-closed)
gate_policy.pass_condition: canary_preservation >= 98% AND fresh delta >= -0.01 AND target delta >= +0.03 AND both slices sufficient
gate_policy.active_mutation: forbidden; immutable edge ledger + valid_at/invalid_at supersession marks only

kill_conditions: Any accepted candidate regresses canary knowledge below 98% preservation or fresh validation recall@10 by more than 0.01.
Any exact normalized query overlap across splits, evidence replay mismatch, unequal query-time views, or use of query ID as a model feature is detected.

control_arms.frozen: no absorption; base hyperedge ledger throughout
control_arms.absorb_all: every round's candidate committed unconditionally (no gate); isolates the gate's filtering effect
control_arms.gated: candidates committed only on shadow-gate PASS

substitutions.dataset: SiReRAG 2Wiki dev 1000 rows losslessly converted to the P5/P6 loader schema (original /Volumes/GM/bench/2wiki_dev.jsonl unmounted; downloads forbidden); same n=900, seed=8217, split sizes, and anti-memorization discipline as P6
substitutions.embedding: deterministic lexical vectors (hashed unigram+bigram TF-IDF through seeded random projection, stdlib+numpy) replace all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (weights unavailable offline); identical across all arms, all comparisons paired

deferred: neural encoder rerun when the external volume returns
